name: Magic 2013

draft.notes: 10 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 ad card, 1 basic land. If a foil appears it comes after the land and displaces a common.

sourceNotes: Core set. 15-card booster packs plus an additional ad card (36/box). Foil 1:67 cards. US sequential collation with C1/C2 common runs. The ad/marketing card carries tokens/tips on its front face (not a collectible token slot).
